chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.S-304 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.09.2025 Mr. Ghulam Mustaf Magsi, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asstt. A. G. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G assisted by Mr. Zain-ul- Abideen Abbasi, A.P.G. ASI Deedar Ali Umrani on behalf of SHO PS Miro Khan & Inspector Manzoor Ahmed Mahar Incharge P.P. Pakho are present. -.-.-.-.-.- Statements are filed on behalf of SHO PS Miro Khan & SHO PS Pakho/Ex-SHO PS Miro Khan, taken on record. In the statements both the official respondents have categorically mentioned that neither have they caused harassment to the petitioner they nor intend to do so in future. In view of above, learned Counsel for the petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of the petition with direction to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law. Learned Asstt. A. G has no objection Order accordingly. A copy of this order shall be sent by fax to SSP Kamber Shahdadkot for compliance. Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
